recommendations.title: A.R.O.G
recommendations.overview: Commander Logar fools Arif and sends him 1.000.000 years back in the time. He must civilize people from past to reach today.

recommendations.title: The Magician
recommendations.overview: Failed magician Iskender decides to do a tour to save his career, but has to bring his grumpy and senile father along. The tour is quite unexpectedly interrupted when a bride actually disappears from the stage.

recommendations.title: The Bad Guys
recommendations.overview: When the Bad Guys, a crew of criminal animals, are finally caught after years of heists and being the world’s most-wanted villains, Mr. Wolf brokers a deal to save them all from prison.

recommendations.title: Let Me Eat Your Pancreas
recommendations.overview: A dying girl meets a nonchalant boy who found out her secret. She decided to fulfill her bucket list with none-other-than the boy who couldn't care less about the world.

recommendations.title: One Cut of the Dead
recommendations.overview: Real zombies arrive and terrorize the crew of a zombie film being shot in an abandoned warehouse, said to be the site of military experiments on humans.
